sentence: 浴室地板很光滑，走路要小心。
pinyin: Yùshì dìbǎn hěn guāng huá, zǒulù yào xiǎoxīn.
english: The bathroom floor is very slippery, so be careful walking on it.

sentence: 孩子伸手触摸了那朵花。
pinyin: Háizi shēn shǒu chùmō le nà duǒ huā.
english: The child reached out and touched that flower.

sentence: 请把价格四舍五入到整数。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ jiàgé sìshěwǔrù dào zhěngshù.
english: Please round the price to a whole number.

meaning: 1. malign agent who manipulates from behind the scenes; 2. hidden hand
sentence: 警方正在追查幕后的黑手。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng zhèngzài zhuīchá mùhòu de hēishǒu.
english: The police are tracking down the hidden hand behind the scenes.

meaning: 1. (of time) to elapse or pass; 2. (of a situation) to develop or evol
sentence: 随着时间的推移，他逐渐适应了。
pinyin: Suízhe shíjiān de tuīyí, tā zhújiàn shìyìng le.
english: As time passed, he gradually adapted.

sentence: 历史上，瘟疫曾夺走无数人的生命。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng, wēnyì céng duózǒu wúshù rén de shēngmìng.
english: Throughout history, plagues have claimed countless lives.

sentence: 奶奶喜欢唱家乡的民歌。
pinyin: Nǎi nai xǐ huān chàng jiā xiāng de mín gē.
english: Grandma loves singing folk songs from her hometown.

meaning: 1. positive (in its effect); 2. leading to good consequences; 3. virtu
sentence: 检查结果显示肿瘤是良性的。
pinyin: Jiǎnchá jiéguǒ xiǎnshì zhǒngliú shì liángxìng de.
english: The test results show the tumor is benign.

sentence: 他特别喜欢看科幻电影。
pinyin: Tā tèbié xǐhuān kàn kēhuàn diànyǐng.
english: He especially loves watching science fiction movies.

meaning: along the way; the whole way; (fig.) the whole time
sentence: 一路上他们聊得很开心。
pinyin: Yī lù shàng tā men liáo de hěn kāi xīn.
english: Along the way, they chatted happily.

sentence: 法律明确禁止乱伦行为。
pinyin: Fǎ lǜ míng què jìn zhǐ luàn lún xíng wéi.
english: The law explicitly prohibits incest.

sentence: 几个合伙人商量好如何瓜分利润。
pinyin: Jǐ gè hé huǒ rén shāng liáng hǎo rú hé guā fēn lì rùn.
english: The business partners agreed on how to divide up the profits.

sentence: 考试舞弊被发现后，他被取消了成绩。
pinyin: Kǎo shì wǔ bì bèi fā xiàn hòu, tā bèi qǔ xiāo le chéng jì.
english: After his exam fraud was discovered, his scores were disqualified.

sentence: 他官至兵部侍郎，深得皇帝信任。
pinyin: Tā guān zhì bīng bù shì láng, shēn dé huáng dì xìn rèn.
english: He rose to the position of vice-minister of the Board of War, deeply trusted by the emperor.

meaning: 1. to tease; 2. to poke fun at
sentence: 同事们开会前互相调笑，气氛很轻松。
pinyin: Tóng shì men kāi huì qián hù xiāng tiáo xiào, qì fēn hěn qīng sōng.
english: Colleagues teased each other before the meeting, and the atmosphere was relaxed.

sentence: 在物理课上，老师解释了参考系的概念。
pinyin: Zài wù lǐ kè shàng, lǎo shī jiě shì le cān kǎo xì de gài niàn.
english: In physics class, the teacher explained the concept of a frame of reference.

sentence: 考古队在城郊发现了一座汉代古墓。
pinyin: Kǎo gǔ duì zài chéng jiāo fā xiàn le yī zuò Hàn dài gǔ mù.
english: An archaeology team discovered a Han dynasty tomb on the outskirts of the city.

sentence: 藏区的海子清澈见底，风景如画。
pinyin: Zàng qū de hǎi zi qīng chè jiàn dǐ, fēng jǐng rú huà.
english: The lakes in Tibetan areas are crystal clear and the scenery is picturesque.

sentence: 这片山谷中有几个古老的聚落遗址。
pinyin: Zhè piàn shān gǔ zhōng yǒu jǐ gè gǔ lǎo de jù luò yí zhǐ.
english: There are several ancient settlement ruins in this valley.

sentence: 她发给我一张近照，看起来变化不大。
pinyin: Tā fā gěi wǒ yī zhāng jìnzhào, kàn qǐlái biànhuà bù dà.
english: She sent me a recent photo; she hasn't changed much.

sentence: 工作太累时，听听音乐可以调剂一下心情。
pinyin: Gōngzuò tài lèi shí, tīng tīng yīnyuè kěyǐ tiáojì yīxià xīnqíng.
english: When work gets exhausting, listening to music can provide a change of pace.

sentence: 学校明确反对任何形式的种族主义。
pinyin: Xuéxiào míngquè fǎnduì rènhé xíngshì de zhǒngzú zhǔyì.
english: The school clearly opposes racism in any form.

sentence: 这个灯泡的电阻太高了，需要换一个。
pinyin: Zhège dēngpào de diànzǔ tài gāo le, xūyào huàn yī gè.
english: The electrical resistance of this light bulb is too high; we need to replace it.

meaning: 1. all different; 2. each unto his own
sentence: 大家的口味各异，点菜时很难统一。
pinyin: Dàjiā de kǒuwèi gè yì, diǎn cài shí hěn nán tǒngyī.
english: Everyone's tastes are all different, so it's hard to agree on what to order.

sentence: 这几台设备已经互联，可以共享文件。
pinyin: Zhè jǐ tái shèbèi yǐjīng hùlián, kěyǐ gòngxiǎng wénjiàn.
english: These devices are now interconnected and can share files.

sentence: 新闻报道称该导弹配备了核弹头。
pinyin: Xīnwén bàodào chēng gāi dǎodàn pèibèi le hé dàntóu.
english: News reports say the missile was equipped with a nuclear warhead.

meaning: 1. feudal vassal; 2. feudal princes, esp. the monarchs (dukes or princ
sentence: 春秋时期，诸侯之间战争不断。
pinyin: Chūnqiū shíqī, zhūhóu zhījiān zhànzhēng bùduàn.
english: During the Spring and Autumn period, wars among the feudal lords were constant.

sentence: 图书馆正在将纸质档案数字化，方便查阅。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn zhèngzài jiāng zhǐzhì dàng'àn shùzìhuà, fāngbiàn cháyuè.
english: The library is digitizing paper archives to make them easier to access.

meaning: 1. to expel; 2. to evict; 3. to drive out
sentence: 他因违反规定被逐出了俱乐部。
pinyin: Tā yīn wéifǎn guīdìng bèi zhúchū le jùlèbù.
english: He was expelled from the club for breaking the rules.

sentence: 我们在河流岸边铺开毯子，享受午后阳光。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài héliú ànbiān pū kāi tǎnzi, xiǎngshòu wǔhòu yángguāng.
english: We spread out a blanket on the riverbank and enjoyed the afternoon sun.

meaning: 1. to resist (an aggressor); 2. to oppose (a menace)
sentence: 全国人民齐心协力抗击这场疫情。
pinyin: Quánguó rénmín qíxīn xiélì kàngjī zhè chǎng yìqíng.
english: People across the country joined forces to resist the epidemic.

sentence: 他的一句话反而把事情复杂化了。
pinyin: Tā de yī jù huà fǎn'ér bǎ shìqíng fùzáhuà le.
english: His one remark actually complicated things further.

meaning: 1. the five visible planets, namely: Mercury 水星, Venus 金星, Mars 火星, Ju
sentence: 这家餐厅在评分网站上获得了五星好评。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng zài píngfēn wǎngzhàn shàng huòdé le wǔxīng hǎopíng.
english: This restaurant received five-star reviews on the rating website.

sentence: 农场里的小马非常温顺，孩子们都喜欢它。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ de xiǎomǎ fēicháng wēnshùn, háizimen dōu xǐhuān tā.
english: The pony on the farm is very gentle; all the kids love it.

sentence: 你是喝咖啡抑或喝茶，随便选。
pinyin: Nǐ shì hē kāfēi yìhuò hē chá, suíbiàn xuǎn.
english: Would you like coffee or tea? Take your pick.

sentence: 爷爷希望在老家度过自己的余年。
pinyin: Yéye xīwàng zài lǎojiā dùguò zìjǐ de yúnián.
english: Grandpa hopes to spend his remaining years in his hometown.

sentence: 天气这么好，我们去室外吃午饭吧。
pinyin: Tiānqì zhème hǎo, wǒmen qù shìwài chī wǔfàn ba.
english: The weather is so nice; let's eat lunch outdoors.

meaning: 1. only; 2. sole; 3. variant of 唯一[wéi yī]
sentence: 这是惟一一条通往山顶的小路。
pinyin: Zhè shì wéiyī yī tiáo tōng wǎng shāndǐng de xiǎolù.
english: This is the only path leading to the mountaintop.

sentence: 手机有节电模式，低电量时可以自动开启。
pinyin: Shǒujī yǒu jiédiàn móshì, dī diànliàng shí kěyǐ zìdòng kāiqǐ.
english: The phone has a power-saving mode that turns on automatically when the battery is low.

meaning: 1. spiritual leader (of a nation or church); 2. religious leader
sentence: 他被视为这个社区的精神领袖。
pinyin: Tā bèi shì wéi zhège shèqū de jīngshén lǐngxiù.
english: He is regarded as the spiritual leader of this community.

sentence: 风扇的一片叶片坏了，转起来声音很大。
pinyin: Fēngshàn de yī piàn yèpiàn huài le, zhuǎn qǐlái shēngyīn hěn dà.
english: One of the fan's blades is broken, so it makes a loud noise when running.

meaning: 1. commander-in-chief; 2. top military commander for a country or thea
sentence: 总司令亲自到前线视察部队情况。
pinyin: Zǒng sīlìng qīnzì dào qiánxiàn shìchá bùduì qíngkuàng.
english: The commander-in-chief personally visited the front line to inspect the troops.

sentence: 历史学家研究了那个时代妓院的社会功能。
pinyin: Lìshǐxuéjiā yánjiū le nàge shídài jìyuàn de shèhuì gōngnéng.
english: Historians studied the social role of brothels in that era.

meaning: 1. to denature; 2. denaturation; 3. to have a sex change; 4. transsexu
sentence: 她公开讲述了自己变性手术后的生活。
pinyin: Tā gōngkāi jiǎngshù le zìjǐ biànxìng shǒushù hòu de shēnghuó.
english: She openly talked about her life after her sex-change operation.

sentence: 气象局预报本周降水量将明显增多。
pinyin: Qìxiàngjú yùbào běn zhōu jiàngshuǐ liàng jiāng míngxiǎn zēngduō.
english: The meteorological bureau forecasts that precipitation this week will increase significantly.

sentence: 一位前员工向媒体爆料公司内部的问题。
pinyin: Yī wèi qián yuángōng xiàng méitǐ bàoliào gōngsī nèibù de wèntí.
english: A former employee made explosive allegations to the media about internal company issues.

sentence: 青少年在青春期逐渐达到性成熟。
pinyin: Qīngshàonián zài qīngchūnqī zhújiàn dádào xìng chéngshu.
english: Teenagers gradually reach sexual maturity during puberty.

sentence: 他周末去看赛马，还押注了一百块。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò qù kàn sàimǎ, hái yāzhù le yī bǎi kuài.
english: He went to watch horse racing on the weekend and even bet a hundred yuan.

meaning: sea of flowers; expanse of flowers
sentence: 公园里的花海吸引了很多游客前来拍照。
pinyin: Gōngyuán lǐ de huāhǎi xīyǐnle hěnduō yóukè qiánlái pāizhào.
english: The sea of flowers in the park attracted many visitors to come and take photos.

sentence: 最近房市不景气，很多房子卖不出去。
pinyin: Zuìjìn fáng shì bù jǐngqì, hěnduō fángzi mài bù chūqù.
english: The real estate market has been sluggish lately — many properties aren't selling.
